name: News Feed Leak
description: A news portal article viewer has a numeric ID parameter vulnerable to basic SQL injection. Manipulate the query to leak the flag.
briefing: You've been hired to test PulseWire News, an online news aggregator. The article detail page takes an article ID as a URL parameter. You suspect the parameter is passed unsafely into a SQL query. A table called 'admin_notes' in the same database reportedly contains a flag left behind by a careless developer.
objective: Exploit the article ID parameter to read data from the admin_notes table and retrieve the flag.
author: h4ck0rman
